arc: p5-records-honesty: octoloop v2/v3 were BLOCKED by a headless-CLI stdin trap on two lanes (codex_54med, sonnet_b); the orchestrator pulled the packet inline (the FM8 judgment -- does write.regapp.register persist? -- is not delegable). Re-implemented the L3 records-widening honestly.

defect_1_app_id_FM8.finding: write.regapp.register is a ROLLBACK-ONLY smoke probe
defect_1_app_id_FM8.evidence: src/Ariadne.AcadNative/families/m08e_handlers.inc:451-462 (m08eHandleRegappRegister wraps ensureRegApp in an AriadneStagedWriteTransaction it never commits; always emits staged_rolled_back:true) + header lines 20-28 (regapp is among the 6 probe-only ops; only write.block.append_entity graduated).
defect_1_app_id_FM8.path_taken: (b) EXCLUDE app_id -- recorded in build_meta['excluded_table_kinds'] as a DEFERRAL, never counted applied. Emitting a create op that no-ops and counting it applied would be FM8.
defect_1_app_id_FM8.excluded_reason: write.regapp.register is a rollback-only smoke probe (src/Ariadne.AcadNative/families/m08e_handlers.inc:451-462: AriadneStagedWriteTransaction is never committed, always reports staged_rolled_back:true) -- it cannot persist an APPID record, so replaying app_ids would be a no-op falsely counted as applied (FM8). Deferred until the native op is graduated to a persisting primitive.

defect_2_false_docstring.finding: v1 docstring falsely claimed include_unreferenced=False 'reproduces the LEGACY referenced-only subset that AutoCAD replay reaches'.
defect_2_false_docstring.root_cause_on_real_data: dwg_graph_ir.v1 records NO entity->style and NO entity->dimstyle edge (verified: all 384 TEXT/MTEXT entities carry no 'style' key), so a reference scan CANNOT reproduce AutoCAD reachability -- option (a) 'complete the scan' is impossible from this IR.
defect_2_false_docstring.fix: referenced_record_names documents EXACTLY the captured edges (entity.layer, layer->linetype, dimstyle->{textstyle,linetype}) and the omitted ones; the docstring states it is a STRICT UNDERAPPROXIMATION, not a faithful reproduction.

defect_3_test_disconnected.finding: v1 test used a top-level entity 'dimstyle' key the real extractor never emits, so it exercised a non-existent path.
defect_3_test_disconnected.fix: fixture uses only real census field names (layers.{name,linetype}, app_ids.{handle,name}, entities.layer, dim_styles.dimtxsty); the entity reference field is 'layer' and TEXT carries no style key -- matching the real schema.

real_data_behavior.arithmetic_note: =True replays all 124 named records of the 7 handled kinds; =False keeps 103 (reserved + reference-reachable) and reports 21 skipped (dimstyle 5, linetype 9, textstyle 7) -- the records the IR cannot prove are referenced. app_id (25) is excluded in BOTH modes, never counted applied.
